entries.description: Remark: Case transferred from Kentucky Western has been opened in Southern District of New York as case 1:26-cv-05246, filed 06/22/2026. (KJA)

ORDER GRANTING JOINT MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF NEW YORK Signed by Judge Greg N. Stivers on 6/22/2026 granting 13 Motion to Transfer Case. This matter is to be transferred to the Southern District of New York. cc: Counsel (DeW) (Entered: 06/22/2026)

Joint MOTION to Transfer Case to the Southern District of New York by Defendants Kalshi Klear LLC, Kalshi Klear, Inc., Kalshi Trading LLC, Kalshi, Inc., KalshiEX LLC, Susquehanna Government Products, LLLP, Susquehanna International Group, LLP (Attachments: # 1 Proposed Order) (Morgan, Grahmn) (Entered: 06/18/2026)
ORDER FOR ADMISSION PRO HAC VICE Signed by Judge Greg N. Stivers on 5/20/2026 granting 11 Motion for Wesley W. Barnett to Appear Pro Hac Vice. cc: Counsel (DeW) (Entered: 05/20/2026)

MOTION for Wesley W. Barnett to Appear Pro Hac Vice Filing fee $ 150, receipt number AKYWDC-4536106. by Plaintiff Donovan Roberts (Rhoads, Christopher) (Additional attachment(s) added on 5/19/2026: # 1 Proposed Order) (TJD). (Entered: 05/19/2026)
Summons Issued as to Kalshi Klear, Inc. Counsel for Plaintiff is responsible for printing and serving the attached issued summons. (TJD) (Entered: 05/14/2026)

ATTORNEY NOTICE of Deficiency to Wesley W. Barnett re 1 Complaint,.Reason for Deficiency: motion to appear pro hac vice. Failure to comply will be brought to the attention of the Court. Response due by 6/1/2026. (KJA) (Entered: 05/13/2026)
NOTICE of Tendering Disclosure Statement by Donovan Roberts (Attachments: # 1 Supplement Disclosure Statement) (Rhoads, Christopher) (Entered: 05/13/2026)
NOTICE of Tendering Summons by Donovan Roberts (Attachments: # 1 Summons) (Rhoads, Christopher) (Entered: 05/13/2026)

NOTICE of Deficiency to Christopher L. Rhoads, Counsel for Plaintiff re 1 Complaint. Reason for Deficiency: Missing Rule 7.1(a)(2) Diversity Disclosure Statement. Failure to comply will be brought to the attention of the Court. Response due by 5/19/2026. (TJD) (Entered: 05/12/2026)
NOTICE ON SUMMONS to Christopher L. Rhoads, Counsel for Plaintiff re 1 Complaint. No Summons tendered for Kalshi Klear, Inc. (TJD) (Entered: 05/12/2026)
NOTICE of Tendering Summonses by Donovan Roberts (Attachments: # 1 Summons, # 2 Summons, # 3 Summons, # 4 Summons, # 5 Summons, # 6 Summons) (Rhoads, Christopher) (Entered: 05/12/2026)

Summonses Issued as to Kalshi, Inc., KalshiEX LLC, Kalshi Klear LLC, Kalshi Trading LLC, Susquehanna International Group, LLP, and Susquehanna Government Products, LLLP. Counsel for Plaintiff is responsible for printing and serving the attached issued summonses. (TJD) (Entered: 05/12/2026)
Case Assignment (Random Selection): Case Assigned to Judge Greg N. Stivers. (SMJ) (Entered: 05/11/2026)

STATEWIDE CLASS ACTION COMPLAINT against Kalshi Klear LLC, Kalshi Klear, Inc., Kalshi Trading LLC, Kalshi, Inc., KalshiEX LLC, Susquehanna Government Products, LLLP, and Susquehanna International Group, LLP (filing fee $405, receipt number AKYWDC-4526566), filed by Donovan Roberts. (Attachments: # 1 Exhibit - news article, # 2 Cover Sheet) (SMJ) (Entered: 05/11/2026)
